action: Add a separately trusted Ed25519 checkpoint over the preregistered acoustic trial ledger head.

progress.finding: A separately trusted Ed25519 checkpoint binds the protocol hash, ledger head, identity, count, and issuance time so a complete local chain rewrite fails unless the attacker also controls a trusted signing key or the verifier's retained state.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime; no trusted CI run or production integration is claimed.

handoff: Vercel Studio should integrate checkpoint creation at preregistered milestones and require matching R-041 ledger verification plus R-042 trusted checkpoint verification before evaluating repeated iPhone audibility trials. Keep the trusted public key and retained expected checkpoint state outside the mutable trial ledger boundary.
